target_branch.description: Base branch to create the new worktree from

new_branch.description: Name of the new branch created in the worktree. When omitted and one or more .md docs are passed, derived from doc metadata per references/doc-naming.md.

docs.description: Positional .md paths (auto-detected, no flag). Untracked docs are physically moved into the worktree and committed as `docs: add <filenames>`. Already-committed docs are skipped (inherited via base). Modified/staged docs cause a hard error.
